payload.summary: Iteration 1: merged self-analysis with an independent adversarial review (14 findings fixed, 1 deferred). Resolved a critical D9 self-contradiction (work-package + diagram still said 'pattern matcher' after the design swapped to an LLM classifier), a critical unsanitized-transcript-on-disk security gap, and high/medium traceability + testability issues.
completed_work: F1 critical: rewrote wp-coordinator-extensions description + component diagram (pattern matcher -> LLM classifier)
F2 high: added audit_triage.py, audit_triage_prompts/**, pyproject.toml to wp write_allow + locks
F3 critical: sanitize-before-disk + gitignore docs/transcripts/ (spec scenario + task 6.8)
F4 high: enumerated sanitizer detectors (bare secrets, AIza, sk-proj, JWT, Authorization) + recall test
F5 high: struggle_class enum + recall-floor fixture tests (spec + tasks 2.5/6.9/6.10)
F6 medium: added task 5.7 report-to-feature pipeline
F7 medium: added suggested_improvement to D4 + task 1.4
F8 medium: resolved task 6.9 to direct agents_config import
F9 medium: prompt_version on transcript-mined findings (spec + tasks)
F10 medium: source default = self-reported when omitted (spec + task 1.4)
F11/F12/F13/F14 low: feature count 7->9, CLAUDE.md baseline 130->158, adapter version-drift scenario, ring-buffer ephemerality note

decisions.title: Sanitize transcripts before disk write, not just before LLM
decisions.rationale: Reviewer found docs/transcripts/ was tracked and sanitization was only ordered before LLM calls. Now require sanitize-before-write + gitignore as defense-in-depth.

decisions.title: Make 'recall is the controlling metric' enforceable
decisions.rationale: Added labeled fixture corpus + recall floor (default 80%) to spec and to both classifier tasks; defined struggle_class enum (none|minor|significant|severe) so triage output is testable.

decisions.title: Resolve task 6.9 archetype-import ambiguity to direct import
decisions.rationale: Existing skills (implement-feature, fix-scrub) use `from src.agents_config import ...` directly; aligned the transcript-mining skill with that precedent rather than leaving an either/or.

decisions.title: Add orphaned report-to-feature task (5.7)
decisions.rationale: Feature 4 promised a companion proposal-from-finding skill and the spec has a Report-to-feature scenario, but no task implemented it.
